title: New Brandi Rhodes reality show in development
summary: A new reality show starring Brandi Rhodes is currently in development. The Hollywood Reporter reports that Brandi and production company Magilla Entertainment are partnering together for “All Rhodes,” a non-scripted show that will document Brandi’s life at “the center of family, fame, and a rapidly expanding business empire.” There is no network attached at the […]

title: Trick Williams: Lil Yachty Is Not In WWE To Be No Part-Timer Or Just Pop In For WrestleMania
summary:
The on-screen partnership between Trick Williams and Lil Yachty. Night two of WWE WrestleMania 42 on April 19th will feature a United States Championship match. title: CM Punk, Rey Mysterio among names who stop by Bayley’s Lodestone seminar
summary: Several wrestlers have posted to social media about attending Bayley’s Lodestone Women’s Wrestling Seminar. The seminar took place on Thursday, April 16 in Las Vegas. title: Rhea Ripley addresses eating disorder struggles
summary: Rhea Ripley’s physique transition was a highly discussed topic among social media in recent weeks. Ripley responded to a fitness influencer’s Instagram post questioning her training impacting muscle mass. summary: AEW is continuing to lay out a course for selling and promoting their NFL lucha mask line, announcing a partnership Thursday with a national sports bar chain to do so. summary: ODB has been lobbying for one WWE or NXT appearance through TNA’s ongoing partnership with the promotion.
